about.name: Felipe Caceres - Fernandez
about.bio: Hey my name is Felipe and I'm working towards making a difference in the world through humanoid robotics. I'm an undergrad in Computational Physics at Carnegie Mellon University. Physics teaches you to reason about how the world works from first principles and computer science trains you to analyze problems with math, logic, and abstraction. I'm drawn to humanoid robotics because it pushes the limits of what we can build and forces you to problem solve in many different technical fields.

experience.org: Origami Robotics (Humanoid Robotics Startup, YC W26)
experience.one_liner: Owned full-stack development of tactile sensing for dextrous manipulation
experience.description: Owned full-stack development of a piezoresistive FSR tactile sensing matrix for a human data-collection glove and robot hand, designing 9 FPC sensors from scratch in KiCad down to 0.2mm resolution and engineering the full stimulus-to-visualization pipeline.

experience.org: Amazon (mass satellite constellation for global internet)
experience.one_liner: Modeled battery data from internal cell testing to improve state estimation algorithms
experience.description: Modeling new OCV-SOC and capacity degradation data from internal cell testing to improve algorithm for battery state estimation.

experience.org: FIRST Robotics Competition Team 1678 Citrus Circuits
experience.one_liner: Led full-stack development of intake mechanism for 2022 game 'Rapid React'
experience.description: Designed and built a powered four-bar linkage intake mechanism with rollers (modeled on FRC Team 1678's 2022 robot), owning the full process from CAD and prototyping through CNC and lathe fabrication, assembly, testing, and BOM. Structured master and reference sketches for modular, robust CAD across iterations, mentored five new members in assembly and CAD, and authored 11 pages of documentation.

experience.one_liner: Built a team of 5 students, acquired sponsors, built robots, and hosted community events
experience.description: Remote controlled robot and autonomous propeller boat.

experience.org: UC Davis Student Health and Services
experience.one_liner: Created my own short film about mental health awareness on contract
Designed products for people and small brands on the internet

education.credential: B.S. Computational Physics from the Mellon College of Science
education.one_liner: Studying how the universe works, then simulating it
education.description: Relevant coursework: Electromagnetism (33-142), Data Structures and Algorithms (15-122), Linear Algebra and Vector Calculus (21-254), Modern Physics (33-211), Sensors and Actuators (24-251), Experimental Physics (33-104), Manual Machining (24-200), AI Venture Studio (11-681), Fundamentals of CS (15-112), 2D Mechanics (24-261)
My favorite classes where AP Physics and Race and Social Justice
